description.zh-cn: 邀请有礼：每位会员生成专属邀请码/链接，新用户注册时携带 ref 参数绑定邀请关系。支持注册双向积分奖励、被邀请人首单支付后给邀请人额外积分，可选发放优惠券。含邀请统计与奖励记录。
description.en: Referral rewards: each member gets a unique invite code/link; new users bind via ref on registration. Supports dual points on signup, extra inviter points on invitee's first paid order, optional coupon rewards, with stats and reward logs.
